title: Wrendale Designs Christmas Mug By Royal Worcester Ho Ho Ho
description: The Wrendale Designs 'Ho Ho Ho' Giraffe Mug is perfect for use with all types of hot drink.This wonderfully charming Wrendale Designs fine bone china mug features a giraffe wearing a Christmas hat and scarf, is perfect for spreading some seasonal cheer.This mug boasts a 310ml capacity and is made from fine bone china.The mug is both dishwasher and microwave safe.Size: 8(H) x 12(W) x 8.4(D)cm.
